finding_results.notes: Hospital confrontation now adds a formal communication-restriction order with an explicit disciplinary trigger, and Lena switches from direct argument to rapid routed-record documentation before Rao enters.

Seizure aftermath now shows concrete contested transfer of named items (steel dispatch case tag, ledger 43-B humidity bin), explicit refusal of local co-sign logging by Kearns/Merritt, and visible material loss as items leave under federal seal.
Added Lena interior consequence beats tied to Beau's injury (culpability, tactical self-blame, and embodied guilt) before the Rao call transition.
Targeted clipped fragments were rewritten into grammatically complete sentences while preserving pace and pressure.

summary: Revised chapter_11 resolves all four packet findings by concretizing the seizure loss, deepening Lena's embodied accountability around Beau's injury, introducing a new irreversible hospital-level command consequence, and shifting Lena's tactic to documented procedural counterplay before the Rao handoff.
